title: SrishtiPlayz MCFleet ModPack
description: Modpack used by Srishti while playing on the MCFleet server.
body:
This modpack aims to enhance the overall Minecraft experience by focusing on visuals, animations, creative tools, and quality-of-life features for everyday gameplay.

It is designed for players who enjoy a cleaner, more immersive client with better-looking entities, smooth animations, shader support, and helpful creative utilities. Whether you're building, exploring, or just playing casually, this setup is meant to feel modern, expressive, and fun to use.

Have fun, and enjoy the experience!

Socials
Subscribe to [SrishtiPlayz](https://www.youtube.com/@SrishtiPlayz)\
Join Discord [ElsaHideout](https://discord.com/invite/ZbkKfKmmgp)

Contains:

- Mods -

  - [EMF] Entity Model Features  
  - [ETF] Entity Texture Features  
  - 3D Skin Layers  
  - AppleSkin  
  - Collective  
  - Fabric API  
  - Fabric Language Kotlin  
  - Fresh Animations  
  - Fresh Animations: Extensions  
  - Full Brightness Toggle  
  - Hold My Items  
  - Iris Shaders  
  - MaLiLib  
  - Mod Menu  
  - Not Enough Animations  
  - Silly Moves  
  - Sodium  
  - Somber  
  - Text Placeholder API  
  - YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)  
  - Zoomify  

- Shaders -

  - Complementary Shaders – Unbound  
  - Insanity Shader  
  - Somber  

• Client-side modpack\
• Intended for creative play and visual enhancement\
• Safe to use on the McFleet server\
• No gameplay-altering mechanics
